What We Offer

Our Services

Dietitian
Paediatric & Adult Consultations
Personalised nutrition plans based on your health goals. Claimable from most medical aids. I also work with paediatrics, with a special focus on neurodivergent children.
🖥️ In-person & virtual Book Session →
Lactation
Lactation Consultations
Expert breastfeeding support for new and expecting mothers — at home, in-person, or virtually.
🖥️ In-person & virtual 🏠 Home visits available Book Session →
Nutrition
Personalised Meal Plans
Custom weekly meal plans for your preferences and family. Delivered straight to your inbox.
📧 Delivered digitally View Plans →
💳
We claim directly from your medical aid
I claim directly from your medical aid on your behalf — no paperwork needed. We work with all weight management and diabetes programmes including Discovery, Medihelp, Bonitas, Bestmed, Fedhealth, Bankmed & Polmed.
Medical Aid Programmes

Does your medical aid cover a free dietitian consultation?

Many South Africans already qualify through their medical aid.

Discovery
Diabetes Care Programme
If registered with the Chronic Illness Benefit for Diabetes, you can join the Diabetes Care programme — unlocking cover for additional dietitian consultations.
Maternity: Post-pregnancy
At 6 weeks post delivery you are eligible for a free dietitian consultation. After birth you also qualify for a free lactation consultation. *Discovery pays a fixed amount — a co-payment may apply.
Medihelp
Weight Management Programme
Members with a BMI over 30 qualify for an additional dietitian consultation. Register for HealthPrint and get a verified BMI from Clicks or Dis-Chem to activate.
Diabetes Programme
Members with Diabetes qualify for 1 consultation with a dietitian.
Fedhealth
Weight Management Programme
Access to 2 dietitian consults after a biokineticist visit. You qualify if you have a BMI >25, men waist >102cm or women >88cm, or BMI 25–29.
Bonitas
Health Assessment Benefit
Complete a wellness screening or online questionnaire (on the Bonitas Member App) to access the Benefit Booster — including a dietitian consultation.
Bestmed
Tempo Wellness Benefits
Complete your free health risk assessment at any Dis-Chem, Clicks, PnP, Van Heerden, Sparkport or Alpha Pharm to unlock 2 dietitian consultations plus 1 family nutritional assessment.
Bankmed
Personal Health Assessment (PHA)
If categorised as medium- or high-risk by the PHA, or have a BMI >30, you have access to 2 dietitian consultations of 30 minutes each, plus 2 biokineticist consultations.
Polmed
Weight Management Programme
Access to 2 dietitian consults amongst other services. You qualify if you have a BMI >30, men waist >102cm or women >88cm, or BMI 25–29 with diabetes.

Not sure if your medical aid covers dietitian consultations? Contact us.

Check My Medical Aid →
Our Approach

Science-backed care,
human warmth.

At iNutrition, we believe healthy eating should never feel like punishment. We take a whole-person approach — because food is deeply personal.

  • Registered & HPCSA-accredited dietitians
  • In-person at Medicross Langeberg & virtual nationwide
  • Specialist support for pregnancy & breastfeeding
  • Consultations claimable from most medical aids
  • Dietitian-approved supplements
  • Ongoing support between sessions

Medical Aid

I claim directly from your medical aid — no paperwork needed
Request an Appointment
No payment required upfront. Consultations are invoiced after your session and claimable from medical aid.
FAQ

Common Questions

How do virtual consultations work?
After you book, we send you a secure video call link. No software to install — it works in your browser. You receive your plan digitally afterward.
How does payment work for consultations?
Consultations are not paid online. After your session, we send you a detailed invoice which you submit to your medical aid for reimbursement.
How long is an initial dietitian session?
Initial sessions are typically 60 minutes — a thorough assessment of your health history, eating habits, and goals before building your personalised plan.
How does delivery and pick-up work for supplements?
At checkout you can choose delivery (R80 flat rate nationwide) or free pick-up at Medicross Langeberg. For out-of-stock items, click "Request Item" and we'll order it in for you.
How do I receive my meal plans and PDF guides?
Digital products are sent to your email immediately after payment is confirmed. No shipping, no waiting.
